leadText: Not to be confused with the Lift Key. If you were looking for the key in Pokémon Colosseum and XD, see Elevator Key (Orre). The Elevator Key (Japanese: エレベーターのキー Elevator Key) is a Key Item introduced in Generation VI. It unlocks the elevator in Lysandre Labs.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Elevator Key unlocks the elevator in Lysandre Labs, allowing the player to access its lower floors.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method X Y Lysandre Labs (from Mable after defeating her) ZA Lysandre Labs

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A card key that activates the elevator in Lysandre Labs . It is emblazoned with Team Flare 's logo. ZA A key card that activates the elevator in Lysandre Labs . It is emblazoned with Team Flare 's logo.
